About

AI governance that speaks both languages — legal and technical.

Who we are

Axionly is a specialist AI governance and security consultancy, operating as a division of Axiontic — a web and digital solutions company with a track record of building production-grade systems for businesses across Romania and Europe.

We created Axionly because we kept seeing the same gap. Companies were adopting AI tools rapidly — often without any formal review of the legal, security, or operational risks involved. And when they looked for help, they found consultants who were either lawyers with no technical background, or security professionals with no knowledge of the regulatory landscape.

Axionly brings both together in a single, structured engagement.

5 business days
2 disciplines combined
1 clear report
Photo Coming soon
  • AI Governance Certified training in AI governance frameworks
  • Cybersecurity Practical background in securing digital products
  • EU AI Act Specialist knowledge of Regulation 2024/1689
  • ISO 42001 Aligned — certification in progress

The founder

Every assessment is personally led and reviewed.

[Founder name] is the founder of Axionly and lead consultant on all assessments. With a background in web development, cybersecurity, and AI governance, Axionly was founded to help organisations navigate the intersection of AI adoption and regulatory compliance.

With specialist training in AI governance and practical cybersecurity knowledge from years of building and securing digital products for clients across Romania and the European Union, every assessment is personally led and reviewed. Axionly does not outsource its work.

Connect on LinkedIn

Our foundation

Rooted in real technology, not just compliance theory.

Axionly is a division of Axiontic, a web and digital development company that builds production-grade applications for businesses. This technical foundation matters. Our understanding of AI risk is grounded in how these systems are actually built, integrated, and exposed — not just what the regulatory text says about them.

Learn more about Axiontic →
Axiontic
Division Axionly.

AI Governance & Security Consulting

How we work

Four principles we do not compromise on.

  • Honest findings

    We report what we find, even when it is uncomfortable. A report that softens bad news does not protect you — it just delays the problem.

  • No unnecessary complexity

    We translate regulatory and technical language into clear, plain-language findings and actions. Our clients are busy. We respect that.

  • Fixed scope, fixed price

    We do not bill by the hour or expand scope mid-engagement without agreement. You know exactly what you are buying before you commit.

  • Confidentiality

    All assessments are strictly confidential. We do not share client information and we do not use client names in marketing without explicit permission.

Work with a team that understands both sides.

Book a free 20-minute discovery call. We will listen, ask the right questions, and tell you honestly what an assessment would find.

Book a Free Discovery Call
